---
name: Feature request
about: Request support for a format, workflow, or recovery improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Goal

What should RE-Pro be able to recover, edit, rebuild, or report?

## Target Format Or Workflow

Example: MSVC RTTI, Electron source maps, PSARC rebuild, DATA.PSP, live process capture, MCP reconstruction.

## Available References

Link public specs, tools, sample generators, or redistributable fixtures. Avoid proprietary sample links unless they are legally redistributable.

## Expected Output

Describe the desired report fields, recovered source, browser nodes, package actions, or tests.
